Confidential  ·  By Intake Only

The map exists.
You simply need
someone who can read it.

A private advisory practice for leaders, builders, and decision-makers who require more than intuition — and more than data — to navigate what is coming.

The Work

The boardroom has analysts.
The brilliant have advisors.
The wise have always had something older.

Natal astrology, properly applied, is not prediction. It is architecture — the precise geometry of your nature, your timing, and the forces currently active in your life. This practice translates that geometry into language executives can use: what season you are in, what it is asking of you, and where your leverage sits in the quarters ahead.

What is produced here is not a reading. It is a private advisory document — researched, interpreted, and delivered with the specificity your situation requires.

How This Is Held
I.
Absolute discretion.
Your birth data, personal context, and the content of any advisory document exchanged through this practice are held in complete confidence. Nothing is discussed, shared, or used as collateral for anything outside our direct engagement.
II.
A brief intake, before anything else.
Access begins with a short intake. This is not a formality — it is how I ensure that what I produce is calibrated to where you actually are, not where you were three years ago or where you want to be.
III.
Specificity, not suggestion.
Nothing produced in this practice is templated. The analysis you receive is built from your natal chart, your active transits, and the context you provide — and nothing else.
IV.
Uncertainty is disclosed, not obscured.
If chart data is ambiguous — an approximate birth time, an uncertain degree — I will name that clearly before committing to any interpretation. You will always know exactly what we are working with.
The Current Offering
Executive Astrological Summary

Your Year, Mapped.

A private advisory document. Four quarters. Your chart. Your transits.

✦
Natal foundation analysis
The architecture of your chart that does not change — your rising, sun, moon, chart type, sect light, and the placements most relevant to your current season. The terrain before the weather.
✦
Major transit breakdown
Every significant planetary movement touching your chart across the four quarters ahead — translated into specific, actionable language about your professional life, income, home, relationships, and physical self.
✦
Quarter-by-quarter strategic focus
What each three-month period is structurally asking of you. Where your leverage sits. What to protect, what to press on, and where not to force.
✦
Delivered as a designed private document
Not a live session. Not a recording. A document you return to across the year as each transit activates — built to be as useful in Q4 as the day it arrives.

A few questions
before we proceed.

This is how I understand where you are — and whether this is the right work for this moment in your life.

Question 01 of 04
What brings you here right now?
Choose the one that lands closest.
Question 02 of 04
Do you have your birth time?
House placements require it. Approximate works. No birth time changes what can be offered.
Question 03 of 04
What is most pressing for you right now?
Be specific where you can. This shapes the focus of the work.
Question 04 of 04
Your name and email.
This is how I will reach you with next steps. Your information is not shared under any circumstances.
